items: Identify the terms, coefficients, and constant in: $4x^2 - 7x + 2$
Translate into an expression: "Seven less than four times a number"

The perimeter of a triangle is $(3x + 2) + (2x - 1) + (4x + 5)$. 
 Simplify this expression.

A phone plan costs \$35 per month plus \$0.10 per text message. 
 Write an expression for the monthly cost if you send $t$ texts, 
 then calculate the cost for 200 texts.
